across.clue: To accuse someone of something is to blame them for doing it.
Butter is a soft yellow food made from cream.
to make something smaller or firmer by pressing it or to become smaller or firmer like this.
A keyboard has buttons marked with letters and numbers that are pressed to put information into a computer.
When something is intact, it is complete and not damaged.
To assure people is to tell them something is true to make them less worried.
If someone is incredulous about something, they do not believe that it is true.
To design means to plan how something will look or work.
money that a court orders you to pay someone because you have harmed them or their property.
An episode is something that happens as part of a series of events.
Hardly shows that something happens in a very small way.

down.clue: Altitude is the height of something above sea level.
An optimist is someone who has a lot of hope and always sees the bright side of things.
Relativity is a set of ideas about time and space developed by Albert Einstein.
To fascinate someone is to make that person very interested.
Performance is how well someone or something functions, works, etc.
Consistency is the state of always behaving in the same way.
If something is coarse, that means it has a rough texture.
If something is overdue it should have arrived/been done/been paid/etc before now.
If something is proper, it is right.
